preview.summary: A heavyweight Group H finale that could decide the standings, with Euro 2024 champions Spain meeting a battle-hardened Uruguay under Marcelo Bielsa. Spain's technical dominance is matched against one of the tournament's most resolute defenses.
preview.homeForm: Uruguay are rated the team most likely to join Spain in advancing from Group H, anchored by an elite defense.
preview.awayForm: Spain arrive as Euro 2024 champions and the world's No. 2 ranked side, regarded as the tournament's most complete team.
preview.homeKey: Ronald Araujo, half of Uruguay's elite centre-back pairing.
preview.awayKey: Lamine Yamal, Spain's most dangerous technical edge on the right.
storylines: The only Group H match played in Mexico, possibly deciding qualification
Bielsa's Uruguay defense versus Spain's possession machine
Spain have never lost to Uruguay in ten previous meetings
preview.h2h: Spain are unbeaten against Uruguay across ten previous encounters.
